ABOUT.TITLE: About CenturyLens
ABOUT.INTRO: CenturyLens is an educational web app that lets you explore historical events that happened on any day of the year.
ABOUT.DATA_BODY: All event data is fetched in real time from the Wikimedia "On This Day" feed API, which covers notable historical events for every day of the year.
